scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/engine && concurrently "npm run build -w packages/server" "npm run build -w packages/web" "npm run build -w packages/bot"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web,bot -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/web" "npm run dev -w packages/bot"
